_note: Inventory-facing grading-company registry. INTENTIONALLY broader than the pre-grader's tolerance set in grading.config.json: you can OWN a slab from any company, but the pre-grader only predicts grades for companies whose centering tolerances/fees are known (PSA/BGS/CGC/SGC/TAG). Do NOT wire the others into the grader without real tolerance data (Golden Rule 4).
_fields: code=short code stored on the item; label=display; scale/step=grade dropdown; subgrades=slab carries subgrades; certUrl=official verification page ({cert} substituted if present; omit if no public page); lookup=true means /api/cert can auto-fill card+grade from the cert number (PSA only today); certFormat=human hint; region=primary market; note=caveats; theme={bg,fg,accent} brand colours for the mini-slab badge (slabBadge in inventory.html).

companies.label: ARK Grading
companies.note: Verify by tapping the slab's NFC chip / scanning its QR — no cert-number web lookup.

companies.label: TCG Grading (AU)
companies.note: Grades Pokemon/One Piece/Yu-Gi-Oh/sports/sealed. Subgrades + slab photos for submissions from Jun 2025.

companies.label: Card Grading Australia (CGA)
companies.note: Est. 2012; 1-10 grade backed by a 100-point internal scale.

companies.label: Premier Card Grading (AU/US)
companies.note: The Western 'Premier Card Grading' — AU-HQ'd (PCG AUS, premiercardgrading.com.au) + US site (premiercardgrading.com), sharing the pcgpopreport.com registry. Distinct from PCGCN (the Chinese PCG).

companies.label: PCG (China · pcgcard.cn)
companies.note: Chinese PCG grader (pcgcard.cn) — a separate company from the Western Premier Card Grading. The slab QR links to a per-card verification page; {cert} deep-links straight to it (confirmed via a scanned slab).

companies.label: EMC — Encapsulated Memories Company
companies.note: Boutique grader; full name confirmed off-slab ('Encapsulated Memories Company', PSA-style Gem Mint 10). No public online cert-lookup portal found — record manually / verify with the grader (a site at encapsulatedmemories.com appears related but is unconfirmed as the card grader).

companies.label: Joyful Box House (JBH)
companies.note: Chinese grader (盒乐屋); slab carries 4 subgrades (corners/edges/surface/centering) on a 0.5 scale. Grading via the MaiXiqi (mxiqi.com) platform; no standalone cert-number lookup portal found.
